description: SEO Structured Data (JSON-LD) components for homepage, product pages, offers page, and breadcrumbs
steps: Create lib/structured-data.ts - Helper functions: organizationSchema(), websiteSchema(siteUrl), productSchema(product), offerCatalogSchema(offers), breadcrumbSchema(items: {name,url}[]). Each returns a JSON-LD object with @context and @type.
Create components/structured-data.tsx - Server component that renders <script type='application/ld+json'> with JSON.stringify of passed schema object. Accept single schema or array of schemas.

Enhance app/page.tsx (homepage) - Add StructuredData component with Organization and WebSite schemas (WebSite includes SearchAction pointing to /products?q={search_term_string}). Use SITE constants for data.
Enhance app/products/[slug]/page.tsx - Replace existing inline JSON-LD with the StructuredData component using productSchema(). Include BreadcrumbList (Home > Products > [Product Name]).
Enhance app/offers/page.tsx - Add StructuredData with OfferCatalog schema listing active offers.
Add test in tests/structured-data.test.ts verifying schema helper functions produce valid JSON-LD objects with required @context and @type fields
acceptance_criteria: lib/structured-data.ts exports schema generator functions for Organization, WebSite, Product, OfferCatalog, BreadcrumbList
Homepage includes Organization + WebSite with SearchAction JSON-LD
Product detail page uses StructuredData component with Product + BreadcrumbList schemas
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm structured data tests pass
